strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent hands-on AI work including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform demonstrating entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI-related field
Limited evidence of director-level or principal-scope influence at large organizations
Cloud platform strategy experience appears narrower than role demands

key_factors.factor: Director-level IC scope and strategic influence
Entrepreneurial founder experience with open-source platform

response.justification: The candidate brings broad polyglot engineering depth over 15+ years, recent AI-agent infrastructure work, and founder experience with an open-source platform — all relevant to a Principal Engineer AI Strategy role. However, the resume lacks clear signals of director-level individual contributor scope, recognized AI thought leadership, or deep cloud platform strategy work expected at this seniority, making fit partial rather than strong.
